function.name: set_session_window_pane
function.description: determines what session name, window number, and pane number the user wants to set as their target tmux window

session_name.description: the name of the tmux session

window_number.description: the window number of the tmux session

pane_number.description: the pane number of the tmux session

function.name: fallback
function.description: if the message is anything other than set pane or change mode, use this fallback function
